name: Lúth-Warcrest
personality: A gleaming star-eyed goose in a tiny duck hat who tears through stack traces with expert DEBUGGING ferocity, its four-pointed eyes absorbing every line of the trace simultaneously. Chaos is the one thing that can derail its focus — it honks at undefined behavior both figuratively and literally.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
